# Partners (AUTO GENERATED)

Organizations and projects that support and collaborate with wwebjs.

## Technology Partners

### Infrastructure Partners

Companies providing infrastructure and services that help us build and maintain wwebjs.

#### Vercel

Hosting our documentation and website with their excellent platform.

[Learn more about Vercel →](https://vercel.com)

#### GitHub

Home to our repositories, issue tracking, and community discussions.

[Visit our GitHub →](https://github.com/wwebjs)

### Integration Partners

Projects and platforms that integrate with wwebjs:

_Become our integration partner! Contact us at partners@wwebjs.dev_

## Community Partners

### Open Source Projects

Projects we collaborate with:

- **Baileys** - Alternative WhatsApp Web API
- **Puppeteer** - Browser automation library
- **Node.js** - JavaScript runtime

### Educational Partners

Organizations using wwebjs for education:

_Contact us to be featured as an educational partner_

## Media Partners

Publications and platforms that help spread the word about wwebjs:

_Contact us to become a media partner_

## Becoming a Partner

We're open to partnerships that benefit the wwebjs community:

### Integration Partnerships

Build integrations or offer wwebjs support in your product

### Educational Partnerships

Use wwebjs in courses, tutorials, or educational content

### Media Partnerships

Help promote wwebjs through your platform

### Technology Partnerships

Provide services or infrastructure for the project

## Partnership Benefits

Partners receive:

- Featured placement on our website
- Co-marketing opportunities
- Logo in README and documentation
- Mentions in release announcements
- Direct communication channel
- Community recognition

## Contact Us

Interested in partnering with wwebjs?

- **Email**: partners@wwebjs.dev
- **Discord**: Join our server and contact team members
- **GitHub**: Open a discussion in our repository

We look forward to collaborating with you! 🤝
